category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Tajikistan.

title.en: China-to-Tajikistan EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入塔吉克斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入塔吉克斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Tajikistan Tajikstandart conformity requirements, Barqi Tojik grid-connection constraints, IEC 61851 safety standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector requirements, cold-climate and high-altitude operational ratings, OCPP interoperability considerations, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines. Covers Tajikistan-specific context: severe winter electricity deficits, mountainous terrain, and the domestic Tajikstandart (not EAC/TR CU) conformity route.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与塔吉克斯坦Tajikstandart合格评定要求、Barqi Tojik并网限制、IEC 61851安全标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口要求、寒冷气候及高海拔运行额定值、OCPP互操作考量，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。覆盖塔吉克斯坦特有背景：严重的冬季电力短缺、山地地形，以及国内Tajikstandart（非EAC/TR CU）合格评定路径。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與塔吉克斯坦Tajikstandart合格評定要求、Barqi Tojik併網限制、IEC 61851安全標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口要求、寒冷氣候及高海拔運行額定值、OCPP互操作考量，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。覆蓋塔吉克斯坦特有背景：嚴重的冬季電力短缺、山地地形，以及國內Tajikstandart（非EAC/TR CU）合格評定路徑。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Tajikistan, the confirmed practical gaps are: (1) the domestic conformity route is Tajikstandart — not EAC/TR CU, which does not automatically extend to Tajikistan since it is not an EAEU member; (2) connector redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required for the IEC-aligned direction, since GB/T connectors are physically incompatible with Type 2 / CCS2 vehicle inlets, although GB/T connectors may also appear in practice due to Chinese vehicle presence — the project or operator specification must be confirmed; (3) cold-climate and high-altitude derating is critical — Tajikistan winters reach −20 °C to −30 °C in mountain regions, and major cities sit above 700 m elevation, requiring component and thermal ratings beyond China domestic baseline; (4) Barqi Tojik grid coordination is required for any grid-connected installation, and severe winter power deficits (daily cuts of several hours in peak winter months) structurally constrain charging deployment; (5) IEC 61851-family safety evidence and IEC 62196 connector conformity are expected for IEC-direction projects; (6) the EV market in Tajikistan is extremely nascent — no large-scale public charging network exists as of 2026. Exporters should verify the current Tajikstandart conformity assessment procedure, applicable GOST-derived or IEC-aligned standards, Barqi Tojik grid approval requirements, and project connector specification before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入塔吉克斯坦时，已确认的实务差距包括：(1) 国内合格评定路径为Tajikstandart——非EAC/TR CU，由于塔吉克斯坦不是欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员，EAC认证不会自动延伸至塔吉克斯坦；(2) 对于IEC方向，须将接口从GB/T 20234重新设计为IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2，因GB/T接口与Type 2 / CCS2车辆接口在物理上不兼容；但由于中国品牌汽车的存在，实践中GB/T接口也可能出现——须确认具体项目或运营商规范；(3) 寒冷气候及高海拔降额至关重要——塔吉克斯坦山区冬季气温可达−20°C至−30°C，主要城市海拔700米以上，对零部件和热设计的要求超出中国国内基线；(4) 任何并网安装须获得Barqi Tojik电网协调批准，且严重的冬季电力短缺（冬季高峰期每日断电数小时）从根本上制约了充电桩的部署；(5) IEC方向项目须提供IEC 61851系列安全证据和IEC 62196接口符合性证明；(6) 塔吉克斯坦电动汽车市场极为初级——截至2026年，尚无大规模公共充电网络。出口商在出货前应核实当前Tajikstandart合格评定程序、适用的基于GOST或IEC体系的标准、Barqi Tojik并网审批要求，以及项目接口规范。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入塔吉克斯坦時，已確認的實務差距包括：(1) 國內合格評定路徑為Tajikstandart——非EAC/TR CU，由於塔吉克斯坦不是歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員，EAC認證不會自動延伸至塔吉克斯坦；(2) 對於IEC方向，須將接口從GB/T 20234重新設計為IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2，因GB/T接口與Type 2 / CCS2車輛接口在物理上不兼容；但由於中國品牌汽車的存在，實踐中GB/T接口也可能出現——須確認具體項目或運營商規範；(3) 寒冷氣候及高海拔降額至關重要——塔吉克斯坦山區冬季氣溫可達−20°C至−30°C，主要城市海拔700米以上，對零部件和熱設計的要求超出中國國內基線；(4) 任何併網安裝須獲得Barqi Tojik電網協調批准，且嚴重的冬季電力短缺（冬季高峰期每日斷電數小時）從根本上制約了充電樁的部署；(5) IEC方向項目須提供IEC 61851系列安全證據和IEC 62196接口符合性證明；(6) 塔吉克斯坦電動汽車市場極為初級——截至2026年，尚無大規模公共充電網絡。出口商在出貨前應核實當前Tajikstandart合格評定程序、適用的基於GOST或IEC體系的標準、Barqi Tojik併網審批要求，以及項目接口規範。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Tajikstandart scope determination, Barqi Tojik approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and installers should verify current Tajikistan conformity assessment rules, Barqi Tojik grid-connection requirements, applicable standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、Tajikstandart适用范围裁定、Barqi Tojik批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行塔吉克斯坦合格评定规则、Barqi Tojik并网接入要求、适用标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、Tajikstandart適用範圍裁定、Barqi Tojik批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行塔吉克斯坦合格評定規則、Barqi Tojik併網接入要求、適用標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
